2163710.name: AevumCore
2163710.description:
The Story

"Long ago, the world of Eirensia was born from a crystal that contained powers to almost a God. The relic is known as The Crystal of Vita in which humans used it as a key through their development. As time passed, countries were developed, and the world lived in a tranquil state. However, this was changed forever after a war was ignited…which resulted in the Crystal’s destruction…"

The Project

AevumCore is an Action RPG that is currently in the process of development and is slowly expanding into a fully developed game. Currently, the project is at the Alpha stage. Our goal is to create an enjoyable and playable demo that users can experience! We hope to construct it into a complete game. Players will be able to explore a large terrain called Primordium (and soon will be able to travel to other available islands in future updates).

Inspired by great role-playing games

AevumCore is our take on an Action role-playing game. The main goal is to make the gameplay fun and accompany it with an interesting and amazing story. This demo offers up to 5 characters to play. We took inspiration on existing franchises and implemented some ideas we thought would result in a fun and unique experience! Give it a try and tell us what you think! We will continue on adding more improvements and features on future updates for the game! Thank you for taking the time to read about this project, hope to deliver an experience that will be great!

Current Build features:

  • 5 playable main characters to choose from

  • A level system to increase stats

  • An action-oriented combat system designed for players to strategize as you fight

  • A large world to explore along

  • Puzzles, platforming and more!

  • Enemies to encounter and fight!

Experimental:

  • Controller support (Mostly)

  • Character UI Menu

  • Map UI

Future features:

  • Sea and Sky travel

  • A Story quest

  • Side quests

  • Hunting

  • Full Leveling, party and skill system

  • More TBD!

The Main Characters

Choose from the 5 heroes in this game and experiment on the one you think best fits your playstyle.

  • Marcus, a hunter and merchant trying to earn a living to help out his foster mother.

    Class: Attack (Constant Damage and All Rounder)

  • Clementine, the princess of a fallen country on a mission to restore her parents and kingdom. Class: Heal (Health support)

  • Lucette, an engineer and thief looking to become wealthy!

    Class: Flank (Heavy Damage and Status Effects)

  • Azura, an Ex-Prasidian guard striving to protect the ones she cares for!

    Class: Support (Skill Point and Status Support)

  • Deante, a Blacksmith longing an opportunity to be a hero!

    Class: Tank (Defense Support)

Exploration

In this game, players will be encouraged to explore the vast and beautiful areas. Explore from large field plains, caves, high mountains, and much more. Each place will offer a different aesthetic and who knows you may run into a secret or two hiding within each area. Future updates will only expand these possibilities to the sea and skies offering countless of breathless views and adventures! (More features will be added as the game continues to get updated)

Combat Style

In this game you will be able to choose to play as one of the 5 main characters, each having their unique sets of attacks and special abilities. Execute from a range up to 7 arts per character at your disposal and chain these arts to form powerful combos. However, be cautious on your attack positioning, guarding and the attack's effects. These are vital and may impact on the outcome of the battle!

DISCLAIMER:

AevumCore is still in the process of development. The requirements may subject to change. Additionally, the demo is subject to change and does not reflect on the final product. We apologize if you experience any issues during gameplay but ask for your understanding as we put our best effort to fix and address the issues. We want to build a game that everyone can enjoy!

Be sure to report any issues/bugs/glitches if you can! This will help speed up the development process.
